pageContext.name: Iron Man
pageContext.description: Everything I've done…I'll ever do, I do to protect this world. - Tony Stark  Tony Stark is a billionaire industrialist and philanthropist and as Iron Man, the leader of the Avengers. Iron Man, with assistance from the Avengers, has traveled to New York City to do battle with Earth's current threat, Ultron. In the shadows of the New York City skyline and the Brooklyn Bridge, Hulk, Scarlet Witch, Wasp, Hawkeye, Captain America, Thor, Vision, and the Ant-Man on a flying ant are all prepared to join Iron Man in defeating Ultron. This is a battle that Iron Man and the Avengers will undoubtedly win.  The Iron Man Limited Edition unframed paper print by Thomas Kinkade Studios was made with the greatest attention to detail and color accuracy. Each is printed on premium heavyweight (100 lbs.) archival papers with superior fade-resistant inks. Every paper reproduction is individually numbered and comes with a matching Certificate of Authenticity.   Fans of Iron Man and the Avengers, be sure to add this triumphant print to your Marvel Fine Art collection today!
